candidates.title: Semantic interaction family
candidates.objective: Define engine-light interaction intents and replaceable desktop, controller, tracked-ray, hand, and gaze adapters without transferring evidence across modalities.
source_requirements: Official OpenXR and engine interaction guidance
Shipped platform interaction principles for controller, hand, and gaze
Capability, accessibility, comfort, and named-device evidence boundaries
candidates.exact_next_action: Decide whether the common semantic core is sufficiently stable to justify a cross-device source gate.
